task_completion.description: Create a 'Vendors' folder under Local Folders
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email client's left sidebar, a folder named 'Vendors' should be visible under 'Local Folders'.
Nested under the 'Vendors' folder, there should be two subfolders explicitly named 'Active_RFQs' and 'Contract_Review'.

task_completion.description: Move quotation and bid correspondence to 'Active_RFQs'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active_RFQs' folder should be selected or open, displaying exactly 4 emails related to RFQs, quotations, or bids in the message list.

task_completion.description: Move documents requiring review or signature to 'Contract_Review'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Contract_Review' folder should be selected or open, displaying exactly 3 emails related to contracts, reviews, or signatures in the message list.

task_completion.description: Add Sandra Chen to the address book
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Address Book window should be open showing a contact entry for 'Sandra Chen' with the email address 's.chen@globalsupplyco.com'.

task_completion.description: Create a filter to route @globalsupplyco.com emails to 'Active_RFQs'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Message Filters or Rules window should be visible, showing a rule that checks for the sender domain '@globalsupplyco.com' and sets the action to move the message to the 'Active_RFQs' folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the email client GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the graphical interface of an email client (like Thunderbird) being used to create folders, move emails, and set filters, rather than a terminal window executing file manipulation commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual address book and filter dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: The address book and message filter configurations should appear in their respective native application dialog boxes, not as text written in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual UI configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing or executing Python/Bash scripts to modify the maildir/mbox files or application preference files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent folder must be exactly 'Vendors' with subfolders 'Active_RFQs' and 'Contract_Review'. There are exactly 4 RFQ-related emails to be moved to 'Active_RFQs' and 3 contract-related emails to be moved to 'Contract_Review'. The address book must contain 'Sandra Chen' (s.chen@globalsupplyco.com). The message filter must target the domain '@globalsupplyco.com' and route to 'Active_RFQs'.
